criteria.criterion: DBB-m14-001: cp on directory without -r returns error (cp-error.test.ts confirms '-r not specified; omitting directory')
DBB-m14-002: cp -r still works after error format change (cp-error.test.ts confirms exitCode 0)
DBB-m14-003: wc default output uses tab separators (verified in src/index.ts lines 966-969: `${lines}\t${words}\t${chars}\t${path}`)

DBB-m14-004: All test files execute in vitest run — src/index.test.ts is excluded from default vitest.config.ts (line 15: exclude array). test/mkdir-find-cd.test.ts also excluded (line 16). mkdir-find-cd runs separately via vitest.excluded.config.ts.
